sections.heading: What's a sliding window?
sections.body: When a problem asks about a **contiguous subarray** (or substring), don't recompute from scratch each time. Maintain a **window** with two pointers, slide it forward, and update your running totals as elements enter and leave.

sections.title: Looking through a moving frame
sections.body: Imagine a film strip and a fixed-size viewfinder. You slide the viewfinder one frame at a time. To know what's inside, you only need to add the new frame and drop the old one — not look at the whole strip.
